name: liblog-any-adapter-screen-perl
title: liblog-any-adapter-screen-perl
summary: send logs to screen, with colors and some other features
description:
send logs to screen, with colors and some other features
Log::Any::Adapter::Screen prints log messages to screen (STDERR/STDOUT).
The messages are colored according to level
(unless coloring is turned off).
It has a few other features:
* Allow passing formatter
* Allow setting level from some environment variables
* Add prefix/timestamps
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use liblog-any-adapter-screen-perl because send logs to screen, with colors and some other features.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use liblog-any-adapter-screen-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair liblog-any-adapter-screen-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `liblog-any-adapter-screen-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
